tasks.compile:linux: deno desktop -A --exclude dist --exclude 'Time Tracker' --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu -o dist/TimeTracker.AppImage .
tasks.compile:deb: deno desktop -A --exclude dist --exclude 'Time Tracker' --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu -o dist/TimeTracker.deb . && node scripts/deb-version.mjs dist/TimeTracker.deb $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
tasks.compile:win: deno desktop -A --exclude dist --exclude 'Time Tracker' --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc -o dist/TimeTracker.msi .
tasks.compile:mac: deno desktop -A --exclude dist --exclude 'Time Tracker' --target aarch64-apple-darwin -o dist/TimeTracker.app .
tasks.compile:mac-intel: deno desktop -A --exclude dist --exclude 'Time Tracker' --target x86_64-apple-darwin -o dist/TimeTracker-intel.app .
